children.name: atomChain.sx
std.sxLib
children.data:
/* SX Standard Library */

// Standard Pay-to-Public-Key-Hash
#p2pkh
    dup hash160 .pubKeyHash equalVerify checkSig
end

// Any-S 'PushTx' ScriptContext Verification (hat-tip @ Brendan Lee)
#signCtx
    toAltStack hash256
    repeat 31n true split end
    repeat 31n swap cat end
    00 cat bin2num 0n 1f num2bin 1n cat add 
    414136d08c5ed2bf3ba048afe6dcaebafeffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff00 @label:curveOrder
    tuck 2n div over lessThan
    if
        over mod over 2n div over lessThan
        if sub else
        nip endif
        else nip
    endif
    repeat 31n dup 0notEqual split end
    repeat 31n swap cat end
    size swap cat
    022079be667ef9dcbbac55a06295ce870b07029bfcdb2dce28d959f2815b16f8179802 @label:derHeader
    swap cat size swap cat 30 @label:sigLen
    swap cat
    fromAltStack // retrieve sighashType
    cat 02b405d7f0322a89d0f9f3a98e6f938fdc1c969a8d1382a2bf66a71ae74a1e83b0
end

// Checks signed CTX
#checkCtx
    signCtx checkSig
end

// Verifies CTX
#verifyCtx
    checkCtx verify
end

// Takes copies and replaces the top alt stack item
#copyTopAlt fromAltStack dup toAltStack end

// Performs N % 2
#mod2 2n mod end

// Splits CTX with scriptCode inclusive of 'fd'
#splitCtx
    4n split @l:ctx.txVersion 32n split @l:ctx.hashPrevouts 32n split @l:ctx.hashSequence 36n split @l:ctx.outpoint 1n split @l:ctx.headerByte
    swap dup fd equal if drop 2n split swap else 00 cat endif
    bin2num split @l:ctx.scriptCode 8n split @l:ctx.value 4n split @l:ctx.nSequence 32n split @l:ctx.hashOutputs 4n split @l:ctx.nLockTime
end

// Convert number to little-endian-unsigned
#toLEU
    1add num2bin size 1sub split drop // Requires int n, int l on stack
end
// Optimized version using ternary-like conditional logic
#writeVarInt
    size                        //Get length of data
    dup                         //Duplicate for comparisons
    //Build the header using nested conditionals
    253n lessThan            //len < 253?
    if
        //Single byte case
        1n toLEU                //Convert to 1-byte LE
    else
        dup 65536n lessThan      //len < 65536?
        if
            //2-byte case with 0xfd prefix
            0xfd swap
            2n
        else
            4294967296n lessThan //len < 4294967296?
            if
                //4-byte case with 0xfe prefix
                0xfe swap
                4n
            else
                //8-byte case with 0xff prefix
                0xff swap
                8n
            endif
        endif
        toLEU cat
    endif
    //Concatenate header with original data
    swap cat
end

#writeVarData
    size dup 0notEqual if
        dup
        4b lessThanOrEqual if
            // small push, use raw push
            // no opcode needed
        else
            dup
            255n lessThanOrEqual if
                4c swap 1n // OP_PUSHDATA1
            else
                dup
                65535n lessThanOrEqual if
                    4d swap 2n // OP_PUSHDATA2
                else
                    4e swap 4n // OP_PUSHDATA4
                endIf
            endIf
            num2bin cat
        endIf
        swap cat // move size/prefix in front of data
    else
        2drop 00
    endIf
end

#testNops
    repeat 3n nop end
end

#verSizeCatArg // Should we add an equalVerify into this???
    swap size rot equal if size swap cat else drop 00 endIf cat
end
